commit.subject: LU-16688 llite: avoid free empty pointer
commit.message:
LU-16688 llite: avoid free empty pointer

ll_obd_statfs() could free empty pointer, this patch fix it.

Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
